title: Argo CD Multi-Source Application Partial Source Failure
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search source_index>=0 OR source_name="*"
| where health_status="Degraded" OR conditions="*Failed*"
| stats values(source_name) as sources, latest(message) as msg by name, namespace
| sort -_time
description: One failed source in a multi-source app blocks rendering while others look healthy.
value: Isolates which Helm/Kustomize source breaks combined deployments.
implementation: Extract `status.sources[].name` and error fields; alert when any source reports fetch errors.
visualization: Table (app × failing source), Raw message panel.

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)

knownFalsePositives: Pipeline noise during blue/green cutovers, dependency cache cold-starts, or scheduled maintenance windows.
grandmaExplanation: We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.
